title: Nephtowach #5318
definition:
Nephtoah = "opening"

 1) a spring or source of water on the boundary of the territories of
    Judah and Benjamin; located northwest of Jerusalem
nasbUsage:
Definition: Nephtoah = "opening"

 1) a spring or source of water on the boundary of the territories of
    Judah and Benjamin; located northwest of Jerusalem

    NASB:  a place on the border of Judah and Benjamin
